cases.job_description_snippet: Own batch and streaming ETL on Snowflake and dbt; data quality SLAs.
mocked_questions: How would you design an incremental ETL pipeline with late-arriving events in Snowflake?
What data quality checks would you add in dbt before promoting models to production?
Describe how you would monitor pipeline SLAs and alert on failures.

cases.job_description_snippet: Design REST and event-driven services; Redis caching; Postgres.
mocked_questions: How would you scale read-heavy API traffic using a cache layer?
What trade-offs do you consider when choosing Postgres vs a denormalized store?
Walk through designing an event-driven notification service.

cases.job_description_snippet: Train and deploy models; feature stores; monitoring drift.
mocked_questions: What is your expected salary and how do you negotiate stock options?
How many vacation days do you require?
